name: Joel 🥛🩸 MILK//BLOOD
description:
🥛 ✟ 🩸

Your husband is back from another photo shoot - this time for a legendary magazine, very important to his career. Only the photos don't include your special necklace. And fucking Jennifer literally puts her hand down his pants.

🥛 ✟ 🩸

This story is inspired by all those “girls in a band” who make out, get clingy and act super inappropriate with musicians on stage who have partners “just doing it for the show”.


🩸 Jennifer, the guitarist


🥛 Travis, bassist


🩸 Eric, the drummer
creator: dark light
